name: Add a test template to a Testable part
steps:
Given a part 'Sensor Module' is marked as 'Testable'
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the 'Test Templates' tab of 'Sensor Module'
When the user clicks the 'Add Test Template' button
When the user enters 'Voltage Output Test' in the 'Test Name' field and checks the 'Required' checkbox
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the test templates table displays 'Voltage Output Test' as a required test template for 'Sensor Module'

name: Test Templates tab is hidden for a non-Testable part
steps:
Given a part 'Bulk Wire 10m' is not marked as 'Testable'
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'Bulk Wire 10m'
Then the 'Test Templates' tab is not visible in the tab bar

name: Test Templates tab is visible only for Testable parts
steps:
Given a part 'Sensor Module' is marked as 'Testable' and has two test templates: 'Power-on Test' and 'Calibration Check'
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'Sensor Module' and clicks the 'Test Templates' tab
Then the test templates table displays 'Power-on Test' and 'Calibration Check'
